For orders on office objection as Flag 'A'. 2. For orders on M.A.No.25 I /20-16 3. For Katcha Peshi. Mr. Mazher Ali Bhutto, advocate for the petitioner. l. Deferred Ibr the time being. 2. Urgency granted. 3. It is stated by the leamed counsel for the petitioner that on 15.01.201 6 at about 05:00 a.m ( morning time), the respondents have taken away the alleged detenue, Gada Hussain with them and confined him to some unknown place. It is also stated by the counsel that 17 goats and Rs.25,000/- have also been taken away by the respondents. Let notice be issued to the respondents and Addl. A. G for 28.01.2016.
